topic: Managing Admission Leads: Tags, Follow-ups, and Visits
summary: This topic covers the basic operations for managing admission leads, including how to add and manage tags, schedule follow-ups, record campus visits, add notes, make calls, and use the integrated WhatsApp feature.
steps: Navigate to the Admission Leads page.
To identify untouched leads, apply the 'not engaged' filter; these leads are marked with red ribbons.
Select a lead to work on.
Apply a tag based on the conversation with the student (e.g., 'Interested', 'Not Interested').
If a positive tag is selected, the system will prompt to add a follow-up (date, time, remark).
If a negative tag is selected, the system will prompt to add a negative remark.
To add a visit: Select the lead, click 'Add Visit', enter visit details (date, note).
To add a note: Select the lead, click 'Add Note', enter the note details.
To make calls: Click the 'Make Call' option (requires IVR integration).
To open WhatsApp: Click 'Open WhatsApp' on the lead; this will open WhatsApp Web with the student's number pre-filled.
To check lead history: Click 'Timeline' to view all activities related to the lead.
business_rules: Leads with no counselor activity are considered 'not engaged' and are visually marked with red ribbons.
Positive tags require a follow-up to be scheduled.
Negative tags require a negative remark to be added.
important_notes: Direct calling from the system requires IVR integration.
The 'Open WhatsApp' feature automatically populates the student's contact number.
questions: How do I add a follow-up for an admission lead?
What is the process for adding tags to admission leads?
How can I record a campus visit for a student lead?
What does 'not engaged' mean for an admission lead?
How do I use the 'Open WhatsApp' feature for leads?
Where can I see the complete activity history for an admission lead?
